mof2text: C72H18Co18O198 has unit-cell lengths of 26.1317 Å, 26.1317 Å, and 6.722 Å with cell angles of 90.0°, 90.0°, and 120.0°, and crystallizes in the R-3 space group. This non-interpenetrated 3d framework with the unnamed topology, it contains one type of inorganic building block, one type of organic building block, 3 free molecules (O6), 36 free molecules (O2), and 36 free molecules (O). For 6 building blocks 1 (Co3): Co(1) is bonded in a water-like geometry to two equivalent Co(1) atoms. Both Co(1)-Co(1) bond lengths are 3.05 Å. For 9 building blocks 2 (C6H2O2): There are three inequivalent C sites. In the first C site, C(1) is bonded in a bent 120 degrees geometry to one C(2) and one C(3) atom. The C(1)-C(2) bond length is 1.39 Å. The C(1)-C(3) bond length is 1.39 Å. In the second C site, C(2) is bonded in a distorted trigonal planar geometry to one C(1), one C(3), and one H(1) atom. The C(2)-C(3) bond length is 1.39 Å. The C(2)-H(1) bond length is 1.08 Å. In the third C site, C(3) is bonded in a distorted trigonal planar geometry to one C(1), one C(2), and one O(1) atom. The C(3)-O(1) bond length is 1.38 Å. H(1) is bonded in a single-bond geometry to one C(2) atom. O(1) is bonded in a single-bond geometry to one C(3) atom. The partial atomic charge ranges for C, Co, H, O are -0.20 to 0.55, 0.96, 0.12, -0.60 to 0.41.
